query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "ui-mopd: multi-platform on-policy distillation for continual gui agent" linguistics
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (b) and (e) as it measures the performance of GUI agents on the same empirical domain (mobile operating systems) and addresses the same core dependent variable (task execution success in long-horizon scenarios) that the user's "UI-MOPD" work investigates, providing a necessary state-of-the-art baseline for the literature review.
